detail.description: *Sixteen Sounds of Yan Yun* is an epic, free-to-play open-world action-adventure RPG centered on martial arts culture. The game guarantees no pay-to-win mechanics, allowing every player to easily and stress-free experience their own martial arts story. Set against the backdrop of the turbulent Five Dynasties and Ten Kingdoms period in Chinese history, you will become a young swordsman, uncovering forgotten truths and the mysteries of your own origins.
